name: part_009
file: tmp_hololive English -Promise- 2nd Anniversary Concert： Promise 2 You 【#Promise2U】 [9hMVpcDYS-0]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_009.webm

scenes.description: IRyS announces the final scores and crowns Ouro Kronii as the champion. They discuss the upcoming punishment game.
The punishment game drink is prepared. The members smell and discuss the mysterious sour beverage.
The members toast and drink the punishment beverage, reacting to its intense flavor before transitioning back to the concert performance.
Transition sequence showing the city landscape and concert logos.
Ouro Kronii and Hakos Baelz perform the song 'Dai dai dai dai dai kirai'.
scenes.song_name: ダイダイダイダイダイキライ (Dai dai dai dai dai kirai)
